AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class AbstractLocationDataFlowOperationVisitor<TAnalysisData, TAnalysisContext, TAnalysisResult, TAbstractAnalysisValue>

Namespace
Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.FlowAnalysis.DataFlow
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll
public abstract class AbstractLocationDataFlowOperationVisitor<TAnalysisData, TAnalysisContext, TAnalysisResult, TAbstractAnalysisValue> : DataFlowOperationVisitor<TAnalysisData, TAnalysisContext, TAnalysisResult, TAbstractAnalysisValue> where TAnalysisData : AbstractAnalysisData where TAnalysisContext : AbstractDataFlowAnalysisContext<TAnalysisData, TAnalysisContext, TAnalysisResult, TAbstractAnalysisValue> where TAnalysisResult : class, IDataFlowAnalysisResult<TAbstractAnalysisValue>

Type Parameters

TAnalysisData
TAnalysisContext
TAnalysisResult
TAbstractAnalysisValue
Inheritance
object
OperationVisitor<object, TAbstractAnalysisValue>
DataFlowOperationVisitor<TAnalysisData, TAnalysisContext, TAnalysisResult, TAbstractAnalysisValue>
AbstractLocationDataFlowOperationVisitor<TAnalysisData, TAnalysisContext, TAnalysisResult, TAbstractAnalysisValue>
